name: Shrimp Quiche Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup or 4 oz. small cooked shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Generously grease a 12-cup muffin tin.
2. Separate the rolls into 12 pieces and cut each in half or flake into two pieces.
3. Press each half onto the bottom and sides of the cups.
4. Divide the shrimp among the cups.
5. Beat together all ingredients except cheese, using about 1 to 1 1/2 teaspoons per shell.
6. Sprinkle shredded Swiss cheese over the top of each quiche.
7. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
8. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving, or let cool and freeze. Reheat at 375°F for 15 minutes.
9. Serves 24.
Note: Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" by Judy R.
